description_long: This object is a stylized sign featuring the text '3m REFRIGERAÇÃO' with a prominent number '3' and a snowflake symbol inside the lower curve of the '3'. The sign is rendered in a three-dimensional form, with the text and symbols extruded outward, giving it a substantial thickness. The main colors are white, gray, blue, and black, with the snowflake and a stripe on the '3' highlighted in blue. The surface appears smooth and glossy, likely made from plastic or acrylic, with a metallic or painted finish. The sign is solid and not hollow, with no visible moving or interactive parts. There are no features resembling a person, wheelchair, or any mobility aid; it is purely a commercial or business sign.
description: A thick, three-dimensional sign with '3m REFRIGERAÇÃO' text and a blue snowflake, rendered in white, gray, blue, and black with a glossy finish.
description_view_0: The mirrored rear view of the sign, showing the extruded text and snowflake symbol in reverse.
description_view_1: A side profile of the sign, revealing its substantial thickness and the layered construction of the extruded letters.
description_view_2: The front view of the sign, clearly displaying the '3m REFRIGERAÇÃO' text and blue snowflake symbol.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile, again showing the thickness and depth of the sign's extruded elements.
